Blaise Strong, CSCS

Strength & Conditioning Coach 🧠⚡ | MMA & Team Sports Helping athletes get faster, stronger & more explosive

Interested? Sign up here!

Testimonials

Blaise' program has been an essential part of my training. It has allowed me to get stronger, which helped me in both my performance and in my ability to stay healthy and injury free.

Zoe Carter, Yale Cross Country Commit.

Working with Coach Blaise has been a game-changer for my speed and agility. As an athlete, I’ve always been focused on improving my performance, but it wasn’t until I started training with Coach Blaise that I saw the results I was after. His training sessions are not only challenging but also incredibly effective. The progression has been noticeable—my overall acceleration has been much quicker than it was o≤before. During our fall testing, I made personal records of every test. I went from a 43...

Jordynn Griffin, Illinois Wesleyan Track and Field

Before I started working with Blaise, I was focused on increasing my speed, leg power, and explosiveness for my sport, ice hockey. Last summer, I worked with Blaise to get prepared for the upcoming hockey season. Before that, I was in and out of the gym and struggled with motivation to focus on my training. Blaise helped me get back into the rhythm of consistent workouts, and by the end of the summer, I saw huge improvements in my speed and explosiveness on the ice. I felt better physically and ...

Luke Peterson, Orland Park Vikings

I fully enjoyed training with Blaise everyday, he still brought the juice and kept the emotions positive even if it was a stagnant day. Trying to find a way to look positively always and really in a short amount of time turn me back into a performance ready athlete able to compete. I fully believe with a bit more training I will be pushing my limits through the ceiling.

Raef Burke, UFL Prospect

I am a 64 year old man training to maintain and increase my strength after a broken hand and knee surgery. Coach Blaise has been a guiding force helping me reach my goals. He is a patient and knowledgeable trainer who listens to concerns and develops a plan for recovery and strength training. I have witnessed Blaise working with individuals and groups at all levels of fitness. Young to senior. Beginner to body builder. Blaise shares his extensive knowledge of exercise and nutrition to each of hi...

Jim Fratrick

Jim Fratrick

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Kinesiology from the University of Illinois
  • NSCA Certified Strength and Conditioning Specialist (CSCS)
  • Show Up Fitness Certified Nutrition Coach (SUF-NC)
  • Parisi Speed Certified Performance Coach
  • Extensive experience working with clients across a wide age range (from young athletes as young as 10 to adults in post-stroke rehabilitation)
  • Proven track record of helping clients excel in a variety of sports (hockey, softball, MMA, football, track, cross-country, baseball, boxing, basketball, soccer, pickleball, and golf)
  • Experience guiding clients in bodybuilding (hypertrophy) and general health and wellness goals

About me

From the moment I received my first weight bench and supplements for Christmas at age 14, I’ve been passionate about understanding how the human body moves, grows, and excels. That passion led me to earn a bachelor’s degree in Kinesiology from the University of Illinois and become an NSCA Certified Strength and Conditioning Specialist (CSCS), a Show Up Fitness Certified Nutrition Coach (SUF-NC), and a Parisi Speed Certified Performance Coach.

My experience spans working with young athletes just getting started—some as young as 10—to adults focused on post-stroke rehabilitation and individuals looking to enhance their general health and wellness. Over the years, I’ve helped clients excel in sports such as hockey, softball, MMA, football, track, cross-country, baseball, boxing, basketball, soccer, pickleball, and golf, as well as those pursuing bodybuilding (hypertrophy) or simply striving to feel their best.

My goal is to provide every client with expert, personalized guidance that not only improves their performance but also empowers them to enjoy a healthier, more active life.
